cross_scene_arcs.title: From Prediction to Validation of Cosmic Anomaly
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jane progresses from predicting a celestial anomaly to confirming its existence, identifying it as a wormhole, and ultimately gaining institutional support for her research despite setbacks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Anxious and uncertain as her predicted anomaly fails to appear on schedule
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Her research is officially supported by S.H.I.E.L.D. and she retains full access to her equipment

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Thor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jane's connection with Thor evolves from initial discovery and medical concern to personal commitment, shared action in crisis, emotional reaffirmation, and active effort to locate him after his departure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discovers an injured man after a storm and tends to him with concern
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively attempting to locate Thor across dimensions using advanced technology
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Uncertainty about future contact with Thor after his departure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with Institutional Authority over Research Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jane faces suppression of her research by SHIELD, resists the seizure of her work, and eventually regains her materials and institutional backing after Thor's intervention.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stripped of all research materials and equipment by SHIELD agents
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Research gains full SHIELD sponsorship and she retains her equipment
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing vulnerability to institutional control over her scientific work

cross_scene_arcs.title: Integration of Science and the Supernatural
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jane moves from interpreting anomalies through scientific theory to accepting and working with supernatural phenomena, culminating in using advanced tech to bridge dimensions based on Asgardian cosmology.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Proposes the anomaly may be an Einstein-Rosen Bridge with unfamiliar constellations
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Activates a holographic projection of Yggdrasil to locate someone across realms
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The boundary between science and magic remains conceptually unresolved

cross_scene_arcs.title: Quest for Validation and Equality with Thor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Loki repeatedly seeks recognition as Thor's equal, shifting from using magic to assert superiority, expressing emotional vulnerability, attempting to wield Mjolnir, confronting Thor in combat, and ultimately rejecting their bond when validation fails.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loki uses magic to assert himself after being mocked, reacting to Thor's dismissal of his abilities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Loki admits he only wanted equality, not the throne, then lets go of Gungnir and falls into the Bifrost after seeing disappointment in Odin's eyes.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His need for validation from Thor and Odin remains unfulfilled.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Unraveling Identity: From Asgardian Prince to Frost Giant
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Loki's physical transformation during battle leads to the revelation of his Frost Giant heritage, which he initially resists, then embraces strategically to manipulate Laufey while grappling with feelings of betrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loki's skin turns blue when touched by a Frost Giant, confusing him and hinting at his true nature.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Loki reveals his lineage to Laufey and proposes an alliance, using his heritage as a tool for power rather than identity.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Conflict between his Asgardian upbringing and Frost Giant origins remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rise and Fall of Loki's Rule in Asgard
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Loki ascends to rulership during Odin's sleep, asserts authority over Asgard's warriors, attempts to prove his worth through Mjolnir, deploys the Destroyer, and ultimately confronts Thor as a sovereign antagonist before his fall.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loki is named ruler of Asgard, accepts Gungnir, and is knelt to by the Einherjar.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Loki uses the Bifrost and Gungnir as weapons against Thor, then falls into the energy stream after losing the fight.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His legitimacy as ruler is never accepted, and his claim ends in exile.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Betrayal and Manipulation of Dual Loyalties
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Loki shifts from covert support of Thor's defiance of Odin to orchestrating a double betrayal—of Asgard by allying with Jotunheim, and of Jotunheim by planning to eliminate Laufey—consolidating power through deception.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loki aligns with Thor and the Warriors Three in defying Odin to go to Jotunheim.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Loki commands the Destroyer to stop Thor's return, fully committing to betrayal of his brother and former allies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His ultimate loyalty is to himself, but his plans collapse before full execution.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Heir to Exile: The Fall of Thor's Kingship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Thor begins as the confident heir apparent, asserting his readiness for kingship through strength, but his impatience and defiance of Odin lead to rejection, culminating in his disempowerment and banishment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: positioned as heir apparent, asserting kingly authority through presence and combat identity
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: stripped of powers, title, and Mjolnir; exiled and declared unworthy by Odin
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Thor must learn restraint and wisdom to earn back his worthiness

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Path to Worthiness: Humility and Sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After failing to lift Mjolnir and being rejected by his own power, Thor undergoes emotional humility, accepts uncertainty, and ultimately proves his worth through selfless sacrifice, leading to his restoration.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally broken, unable to lift Mjolnir, captured by SHIELD
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: restored to full strength and power after defeating the Destroyer through courage and self-sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his restored power brings new scrutiny from human authorities

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fractured Bonds: Thor's Relationship with Loki and Odin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Thor's relationship with Loki is marked by rivalry and distrust, while his bond with Odin evolves from strained authority to estrangement and eventual reconciliation, though overshadowed by loss.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: competitive dynamic with Loki; strained father-son relationship with Odin
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Odin expresses pride in Thor, but Thor loses Loki, believing him dead
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Loki's fate remains unknown, leaving emotional and familial closure incomplete

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protector of Two Realms: Thor's Evolving Duty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Thor shifts from defending Asgard through aggression to protecting Earth and the Nine Realms through sacrifice and strategic action, redefining his role from conqueror to guardian.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: defies orders to confront Frost Giants, driven by warrior instinct
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: destroys the Bifrost to prevent cosmic destruction, accepting personal cost for greater safety
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his actions isolate him from Earth and Jane Foster

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love and Separation: Thor's Connection to Earth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Thor develops emotional ties to Earth through Jane Foster, endures separation after proving himself, and remains emotionally invested despite being unable to return.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: begins to form human connections, showing vulnerability and openness
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: confirmed to still care for Jane, but physically unable to reunite due to broken Bifrost
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Thor cannot bridge the distance between Asgard and Earth, leaving his relationship with Jane in limbo
